extensionName.message: X/Twitter Following Manager - Instantly Show Follower Counts & Export Lists
extensionName.description: Chrome Web Store title and extension name.

extensionDescription.message: Instantly show follower counts on X/Twitter pages, manage following lists, and export data locally.

pillLoadingFullTitle.message: Getting counts from X page data and avatar hover cards.

pillHoverMissingTitle.message: No hover card was read this time. The extension will keep retrying.

pillHoverInterruptedTitle.message: Hover card reading was interrupted by the page. The extension will keep retrying.

popupHint.message: Toggles control where counts appear on the current page and after refresh.

popupUseOnX.message: Use this on x.com or twitter.com pages.

popupScriptNotReady.message: The extension script is not loaded in this tab yet. Refresh X and try again.

tooltipLockList.message: Lock the manager to accounts already captured or imported. While this is on, browsing X only updates existing rows and does not add newly seen accounts to the manager.

tooltipSequentialUpdate.message: Open one selected profile at a time to refresh follower and following counts. The account list is locked during the run; closing the updater tab stops it.

tooltipSequentialStop.message: Stop after the current account finishes.

tooltipShowComments.message: Show accounts captured only from reply lists. Accounts also seen in the Feed or user lists stay visible when this is off.

tooltipPreferComments.message: When an account has both posts and replies recorded, show the latest reply first. This only changes the displayed post, not which users appear.

managerEmptyState.message: No users captured yet. Open X, scroll a page, then refresh here.

managerNoPostImport.message: Imported from user file, no browsed post yet

managerNoPostUserList.message: From user list, no browsed post yet

managerNoImportUsers.message: No importable users were found in this file.

managerSequentialStop.message: Stopping sequential update after the current account finishes.
